extras.content: qualify as... 具有…资格 // qualify for... 胜任…
What should you do to relieve rage? 译文:你应该做什么来缓解愤怒呢？

senses.example: I finally qualified as a pilot. // Our four-week course will qualify you to teach English overseas.
senses.example_zh: 我终于具有了飞行员资格。// 我们为期4周的课程将使你有资格在国外教英语。

derivatives: qualified a. 有资格的,胜任的

senses.example: Do you have any teaching qualifications?
senses.example_zh: 你有任何教学方面的文凭吗？

senses.example: I agree, with qualifications.
senses.example_zh: 我赞成，但有所保留。

senses.example: Drivers who violate traffic regulations will be fined and their licence will be suspended.
senses.example_zh: 违反交通规则的司机会被罚款并扣留驾驶执照。

senses.example: A doctor is licensed to practice medicine.
senses.example_zh: 医生行医需要获得许可。

senses.example: The film received favorable reviews.
senses.example_zh: 这部影片得到了好评。

senses.example: favorable weather for working outside
senses.example_zh: 有利于室外工作的天气

derivatives: favo(u)rite a./n. 特别喜爱的(人或物)

senses.def_en: to go or move in different directions; to spread apart
senses.example: The police used tear gas to disperse the crowd.
senses.example_zh: 警察用催泪弹驱散人群。

senses.def_en: to make sth.(such as a belief, or idea) go away
senses.example: How can we dispel their doubt?
senses.example_zh: 我们怎么才能驱散他们的疑虑呢？

senses.example: have (no) objection to (doing) sth.
senses.example_zh: (不)反对(做)某事

senses.example: Please present your objection to the plan.
senses.example_zh: 请提出你反对这个计划的理由。

senses.example: The main objective of this policy is to reduce unemployment.
senses.example_zh: 这项政策的主要目的是减少失业。

senses.example: A jury's decision in a court case must be objective.
senses.example_zh: 陪审团裁定案件必须客观。

senses.example: This is a very subjective judgement of her abilities.
senses.example_zh: 这是对她能力的一个非常主观的评价。

senses.example: The annual dinner is a chance to renew acquaintance with old friends.
senses.example_zh: 一年一度的聚餐会是与老朋友叙旧的好机会。

senses.example: The trees renew their foliage every year.
senses.example_zh: 树木每年都重新长出叶子。

senses.example: Remember to renew the books if you can't finish them on time.
senses.example_zh: 如果你不能按时读完这些书，记得要去图书馆续借。

senses.def_en: to reduce sb.'s pain or unpleasant feelings
senses.example: The painkillers can only relieve your pain. // relieve stress
senses.example_zh: 止痛药只能减轻疼痛。// 减轻压力

senses.def_en: to make sth. less dull and boring
senses.example: I went for a walk to relieve the boredom of the day.
senses.example_zh: 一天下来无聊得很，我去散步调剂一下。

senses.example: Robots can relieve people of dull and repetitive work.
senses.example_zh: 单调重复的工作，机器人可以代劳。

derivatives: relief n. 轻松;缓解;接替

entries.mnemonic: re(again)+hear(听)+sal→反复听自己唱歌→排练

senses.example: Our new production of Romeo and
